description: we need to fix how we handle click and drag for movment points that have a dy val of not 0. currently if i clikc a point that has a non 0 y value on click it imidiatly snaps it to the nearest point closet to my mouse wich is ok if it has a y of 0, but since the y value messes with the floor thing it might put it somewhere weirdx. i think what we need to do to click and drag the point propperly is to on click of a point   that is non y treeat the cross hair as the thing to move the xz values and not the 3d point. make it so  we click the cross hairs to move the xz values and the point to adjust its y value. this should probably mean that we also use the cross hair to drag to adjust the xz and the actual point selection to adjust the y.

for the asset info stack movment editor mode:  make sure when we switch between animation / path for that animation we actually load the propper real movment for the selected path for that animation. currently it either doesnt load the path and shows a series of 0,0,0 or it shows the data for the previously selected path. make sure path loading is good for navigateing between animatiuons and paths for animatiuon editor.

for the movement editor in the asset info stack, we need to fix the adjust y behavior. start by fixing the xy grid: on scroll, stop showing the floor grid and display the xy grid. make sure the xy grid matches the resolution of the floor grid. on initial scroll display the xy grid and show it until clicking something which reurns the floor grid. on scroll have it snap to the next resolved point but resolved 3d meaning resolved  y point too  (keeping the same xz value) (and only if snapping is on) if snapping off one scrfoll tick = 1 pix up or down. scrolling shoul;d not effect the xz posditon of movment point. currently on scroll i dont see the y value chnaging at all and i should see everything getting adjustred live

Issues with the task editor thing: when I click Add Task, it creates 2 empty tasks. Keyboard input affects the game / UI things in the game when typing should go just to the tasks panel.
